name: documents_send
description: Send a document for e-signature to one or more signers. Supports file upload, form fields, reminders, expiry settings, and branding. Processing is asynchronous with webhook confirmation.

parameters.name: Files
parameters.description: Document file(s) to send for signing (multipart/form-data).

parameters.name: Signers
parameters.description: Array of signer objects with 'Name', 'EmailAddress', 'SignerType', and 'FormFields'.

parameters.name: Message
parameters.description: Custom message included in the signing notification email.

parameters.name: BrandId
parameters.description: Brand ID for applying custom branding to the signing experience.

parameters.name: ExpiryDays
parameters.description: Number of days before the document expires.

parameters.name: EnableReassign
parameters.description: Allow signers to reassign the document to someone else.

parameters.name: CC
parameters.description: Array of email addresses to receive copies of the completed document.

parameters.name: DisableEmails
parameters.description: Suppress email notifications (for embedded signing use cases).

body.Title: Employment Agreement
body.Message: Please sign this employment agreement at your earliest convenience.
